violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. Meat Heat and serve BBQ chicken drumsticks do not have an ingredient label. Produce department -Grab n go trays do not have all ingredient labels (labels present for salad mix but not for cracker or meat sticks).
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Meat department -Pizza oven used to warm biscuits has dried food debris on grate.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. Meat Department -Floor has cracks in cement and cement no longer appears to be sealed. Produce Cement floor appears worn/due for reseal.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc.…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Meat -Some dust debris at walk in cooler fans.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
